problem: Which team won the 2025-2026 Carabao Cup?
rationale: Manchester City won the 2025-26 Carabao Cup final.

problem: As of 2026, how many consecutive League Cup finals have Arsenal lost since the last time they won that trophy?
rationale: Arsenal last won the League Cup in 1993. Since then they have lost four consecutive finals (2007, 2011, 2018, 2026).
